allow: PowerShell(node -e "const fs=require\('fs'\);const text=fs.readFileSync\('docs/_test_clean.txt','utf-8'\);const chars=new Set\(\);for\(const c of text\){const code=c.codePointAt\(0\);if\(code>127\)chars.add\(c+' \(U+'+code.toString\(16\).toUpperCase\(\)+'\)'\);}console.log\('Non-ASCII chars remaining:',chars.size\);console.log\([...chars].slice\(0,40\).join\(' | '\)\);")
